script_overview.title: 雨夜驿卒
script_overview.logline: 一份失踪的军报，牵出粮草调拨的惊天阴谋。
script_overview.case_summary: 熙宁年间，陕西路青松驿雨夜，驿卒陈四被杀，随身军报失踪。表面为劫杀，实则涉及前线粮草贪墨。调查发现，军报内容为假，真军报已被调换，死者曾与自称京城商人的男子密谈。真相是：监军与地方官勾结，伪造军报侵吞粮草，驿卒因察觉真相被杀。
script_overview.public_objective: 查明驿卒死因，追回失踪军报。
script_overview.player_briefing: 你可以查验现场、询问相关人物、整理线索并在最后作出取舍。

playable_identities.description: 北宋地方文吏，熟悉文书、印记和交接规程。
playable_identities.relation_to_case: 有权查验案发现场与相关簿册。
playable_identities.motive: 厘清文书失误背后的责任，避免无辜者被牵连。
limitations: 不能提前公开未证实的真相
playable_identities.background: 你随官署入场，既要顾及规程，也要找出真正能站住脚的证据。

playable_identities.description: 北宋驿路差人，熟悉行旅、马匹与夜间出入痕迹。
playable_identities.relation_to_case: 能接触驿路、仓房、后门与差役口供。
playable_identities.motive: 证明自己没有卷入案中，同时找出真正破坏规程的人。
limitations: 身份低微，不能强逼高阶人物认罪
playable_identities.background: 你在驿路上见过太多仓促交接，知道细节比响亮口供更可靠。

rules: 文书、印记、口供与现场物证需要相互印证。
人物只会透露自己在当前阶段能够合理知道的内容。

story.surface_event: 驿卒被杀，军报被盗，疑似劫匪所为。
story.hidden_truth: 监军与转运使合谋，伪造军报虚报粮草消耗，侵吞军资。驿卒陈四无意中发现账册破绽，被灭口。真军报藏于驿站暗格，假军报被商人带走。
story.culprit_boundary: 真凶和包庇者必须通过完整证据链确认，任何单一口供都不足以下结论。

stages.name: 入局
stages.goal: 确认表面事件与第一批可见证据。

stages.name: 查证
stages.goal: 扩大现场范围，串联文书、物件与口供。
unlock_conditions: 完成上一阶段核心线索

stages.name: 转折
stages.goal: 识破早期说法中的漏洞，逼近隐藏动机。
unlock_conditions: 完成上一阶段核心线索

stages.name: 抉择
stages.goal: 根据证据决定如何呈报或处理真相。
unlock_conditions: 完成上一阶段核心线索

stages.name: 收束
stages.goal: 查看选择造成的历史余波。
unlock_conditions: 完成上一阶段核心线索

clues.title: 陈四的腰带
clues.display_text: 死者腰间布带，内侧缝有暗袋
clues.detail: 暗袋中藏有一张纸条，写着‘粮册有假’四字，笔迹潦草。

clues.title: 半截蜡烛
clues.display_text: 陈四卧房地上的蜡烛头，有咬痕
clues.detail: 蜡烛上齿痕与陈四牙模不符，疑为他人所留，且蜡烛为京城样式。

clues.title: 马鞍上的泥点
clues.display_text: 马厩中一匹马的马鞍，有新鲜泥点
clues.detail: 泥点呈红褐色，与驿站附近山神庙的泥土相同，表明有人夜间骑马外出。

clues.title: 后门门闩划痕
clues.display_text: 驿站后门门闩上有新鲜刀痕
clues.detail: 划痕角度与力度显示，有人用刀拨开门闩，且刀口宽度与赵三随身短刀吻合。

clues.title: 茶棚碗底的药渣
clues.display_text: 茶棚一个粗瓷碗底残留药渣
clues.detail: 药渣经辨认是蒙汗药，碗上有赵三的指纹，表明他曾下药。

clues.title: 粮草支用簿》残页
clues.display_text: 县衙档案中一本账册，缺了一页
clues.detail: 缺页处有撕扯痕迹，内容涉及近期粮草调拨，数字有涂改。

clues.title: 山神庙油布包裹
clues.display_text: 山神庙供桌下发现的油布包
clues.detail: 内有一封军报，内容与失踪军报相同，但笔迹不同，且有伪造痕迹。

clues.title: 赵三的短刀
clues.display_text: 赵三随身携带的短刀，刀刃有血迹
clues.detail: 血迹与陈四血型相同，刀柄刻有‘赵’字，但赵三声称是防身用。

clues.title: 王驿丞的茶盏
clues.display_text: 王驿丞房内茶盏，内有安神药粉末
clues.detail: 王驿丞声称失眠用药，但药量足以使人昏睡，案发当晚他沉睡不醒。

clues.title: 陈四的鞋印
clues.display_text: 后门外泥地上的一对鞋印，与陈四的鞋底花纹一致
clues.detail: 鞋印方向是从驿站向外，表明陈四曾深夜外出，可能去会面。

clues.title: 李都监的密信
clues.display_text: 从李都监书房搜出的信件，提及‘粮草’‘调换’
clues.detail: 信中指示‘事成之后，分你三成’，落款为转运使，证实合谋。

clues.title: 军报封蜡
clues.display_text: 山神庙军报上的封蜡，颜色与驿站所用不同
clues.detail: 封蜡为京城官用红色，而驿站为普通黄色，表明军报已被调换。

clues.title: 陈四的腰带
clues.display_text: 死者腰间布带，内侧缝有暗袋
clues.detail: 暗袋中藏有一张纸条，写着‘粮册有假’四字，笔迹潦草。

clues.title: 半截蜡烛

clues.detail: 蜡烛上齿痕与陈四牙模不符，疑为他人所留，且蜡烛为京城样式。

clues.title: 马鞍上的泥点

clues.detail: 泥点呈红褐色，与驿站附近山神庙的泥土相同，表明有人夜间骑马外出。

clues.title: 后门门闩划痕

deductions.question: 陈四为何深夜外出？请结合‘陈四的鞋印’、‘后门门闩划痕’和‘茶棚碗底的药渣’分析。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据不足，请仔细检查鞋印、门闩和茶棚的线索。
deductions.success_text: 陈四深夜从后门外出，与赵三在茶棚会面，赵三下药迷晕陈四，后返回驿站。

deductions.question: 军报是如何被调换的？请结合‘军报封蜡’、‘山神庙油布包裹’和‘王驿丞的茶盏’推理。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索不完整，请确认封蜡、包裹和茶盏的关联。
deductions.success_text: 王驿丞被下药昏睡，赵三趁机调换军报，将真军报藏于山神庙，假军报带走。

deductions.question: 谁才是幕后主使？请结合‘李都监的密信’、‘《粮草支用簿》残页’和‘赵三的短刀’分析。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据链不足，请收集密信、账册和凶器。
deductions.success_text: 李都监与转运使合谋，伪造军报侵吞粮草，赵三为执行者，王驿丞为帮凶。

deductions.question: 陈四是如何发现真相的？请结合‘陈四的腰带’、‘半截蜡烛’和‘马鞍上的泥点’推理。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索不足，请检查腰带、蜡烛和泥点。
deductions.success_text: 陈四从账册中发现粮草数字异常，写下‘粮册有假’藏于腰带，并夜间骑马去山神庙查证，被赵三跟踪杀害。

deductions.question: 赵三的真实身份是什么？请结合‘赵三的短刀’、‘茶棚碗底的药渣’和‘半截蜡烛’分析。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据不够，请收集凶器、药渣和蜡烛。
deductions.success_text: 赵三是李都监派来的亲信，伪装成商人，负责灭口和传递假军报。

deductions.question: 王驿丞在案件中扮演什么角色？请结合‘王驿丞的茶盏’、‘后门门闩划痕’和‘军报封蜡’推理。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索不足，请检查茶盏、门闩和封蜡。
deductions.success_text: 王驿丞被胁迫，故意喝下安神药装睡，并协助赵三调换军报，后门门闩划痕是赵三所为。

deductions.question: 粮草调拨的真相是什么？请结合‘《粮草支用簿》残页’、‘李都监的密信’和‘山神庙油布包裹’分析。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据不足，请收集账册、密信和包裹。
deductions.success_text: 李都监与转运使伪造账册，虚报粮草消耗，侵吞军资，真军报藏于山神庙。

deductions.question: 完整的行动链是怎样的？请结合‘陈四的鞋印’、‘马鞍上的泥点’、‘后门门闩划痕’和‘山神庙油布包裹’推理。
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索链不完整，请检查鞋印、泥点、门闩和包裹。
deductions.success_text: 陈四深夜骑马去山神庙查证，赵三跟踪并杀害陈四，后返回驿站调换军报，将真军报藏于山神庙。

endings.title: 正义昭彰
endings.result_summary: 证据提交朝廷，李都监等人被查办，粮草恢复正常调拨。
endings.ending_text: 你带着密信、账册和军报，星夜赶往京城。大理寺受理此案，李都监与转运使伏法，王驿丞流放，赵三斩首。边军粮草得以补充，战事转危为安。
endings.history_echo: 此案成为熙宁年间整顿吏治的典型案例，但朝中党争因此案更烈。

endings.title: 暗流涌动
endings.result_summary: 私下抓捕凶手，但地方势力反扑，你被迫离开。
endings.ending_text: 你率人夜袭赵三藏身处，将其擒获，但李都监闻讯后动用关系，反诬你盗取军报。你被革职，黯然离开陕西路。
endings.history_echo: 粮草贪墨仍在继续，数年后边军因粮草不济溃败。

endings.title: 沉默是金
endings.result_summary: 选择沉默，案件不了了之，但良心受谴。
endings.ending_text: 你将证据焚毁，对外宣称驿卒死于盗匪。李都监派人送来银两，你收下后辞官归乡。夜夜噩梦，陈四的冤魂萦绕不去。
endings.history_echo: 数年后，李都监因其他案件败露，此案才被重提，但已无人追究。

endings.title: 借刀杀人
endings.result_summary: 伪造证据嫁祸他人，成功脱身，但无辜者受害。
endings.ending_text: 你将线索指向另一名驿卒，伪造其与赵三勾结的证据。官府将其处斩，你因破案有功升迁。但真凶逍遥法外。
endings.history_echo: 冤案导致民怨，但被官场掩盖。你青云直上，却永远背负罪孽。

endings.title: 边军介入
endings.result_summary: 联络边军将领，借其势力扳倒李都监，但边军势力坐大。
endings.ending_text: 你将证据交给边军统帅，他以此要挟朝廷，清除异己。李都监倒台，但边军将领权势日盛，渐成尾大不掉之势。
endings.history_echo: 边军将领后来拥兵自重，成为北宋边患之一。

visual_assets.title: 青松驿正堂主舞台图
visual_assets.prompt:
北宋 historical mystery game main scene, refined Chinese historical suspense illustration following this script's visual style guide, ink-wash texture mixed with refined digital painting, cinematic rain/fire/lamp atmosphere, elegant but ominous composition. wide 16:9 landscape composition for a game stage, not square, not vertical, not portrait format, no black side padding. Use the actual story location instead of a generic courtyard: Location name: 青松驿正堂. Location description: 驿站办公与接待之处，案发当晚有商人投宿. Scene text: 青砖灰瓦，门楣斑驳，堂内烛火摇曳，几案上散落着茶碗与文书。. Story surface event: 驿卒被杀，军报被盗，疑似劫匪所为。. Public objective: 查明驿卒死因，追回失踪军报。. Build the composition from that location: if it is a dock, show dock stones, water edge, mooring objects, cargo shadows; if it is a study or residence, show desk, shelf, hidden compartment, floor mats, lamp and wall structure; if it is a tea house, show tea tables, screens, upstairs railings, cups and rainy eaves; if it is a pawnshop, show counter, shelves, boxes, pawn tokens and account objects. Do not collapse every location into the same evidence table template. PRIMARY SUBJECT: one primary visible adult living NPC in historical clothing stands or sits naturally inside the location and shares the same light and perspective; full face and upper body should be readable, no cropped head, no cropped chin, no oversized torso crop, never rear view, never back-facing, never face-hidden. The main person should occupy about 18-30 percent of the frame width so the environment and clue objects remain visible. Living human count rule: one primary NPC is preferred; if the clue requires a corpse, the corpse must appear as evidence and does not count as an extra living NPC. Do not make a crowd scene, army formation, cavalry scene, battlefield, parade, line of troops, street procession, or guard corridor. Do not draw guard lines, troop formations, massed soldiers, horse teams, city-gate queues, ceremonial entrances, flags, banners, weapons, or military staging even if the story location mentions them. Named NPC appearance lock for this scene: 陈四 (appearance lock: 陈四：三十出头，短褐，脸上有刀疤); 赵三 (appearance lock: 赵三：四十左右，绸衫，戴方巾，左手有墨痣). Use the actual story location instead of a generic courtyard: Location name: 青松驿外茶棚. Location description: 过往行人歇脚处，商人曾在此饮茶. Scene text: 竹棚下几张条凳，茶炉冒着热气，桌上有几个粗瓷碗。. Story surface event: 驿卒被杀，军报被盗，疑似劫匪所为。. Public objective: 查明驿卒死因，追回失踪军报。. Build the composition from that location: if it is a dock, show dock stones, water edge, mooring objects, cargo shadows; if it is a study or residence, show desk, shelf, hidden compartment, floor mats, lamp and wall structure; if it is a tea house, show tea tables, screens, upstairs railings, cups and rainy eaves; if it is a pawnshop, show counter, shelves, boxes, pawn tokens and account objects. Do not collapse every location into the same evidence table template. PRIMARY SUBJECT: one primary visible adult living NPC in historical clothing stands or sits naturally inside the location and shares the same light and perspective; full face and upper body should be readable, no cropped head, no cropped chin, no oversized torso crop, never rear view, never back-facing, never face-hidden. The main person should occupy about 18-30 percent of the frame width so the environment and clue objects remain visible. Living human count rule: one primary NPC is preferred; if the clue requires a corpse, the corpse must appear as evidence and does not count as an extra living NPC. Do not make a crowd scene, army formation, cavalry scene, battlefield, parade, line of troops, street procession, or guard corridor. Do not draw guard lines, troop formations, massed soldiers, horse teams, city-gate queues, ceremonial entrances, flags, banners, weapons, or military staging even if the story location mentions them. Named NPC appearance lock for this scene: 赵三 (appearance lock: 赵三：四十左右，绸衫，戴方巾，左手有墨痣). No additional guards, servants, soldiers, clerks, rows, silhouettes, or crowds may appear anywhere. Clickable evidence objects must be clear, visible, and close to the center third of the image: 粮草支用簿》残页; 半截蜡烛; 陈四的鞋印; 粮草支用簿》残页. Hard scene clue requirements, all must be visible as image content and not merely named in labels: 粮草支用簿》残页：在“青松驿外茶棚”中必须可见；必须画成一个具体可见的物件或痕迹，材质、位置、遮挡关系清楚，不能只用标签或抽象概念；线索原始细节：缺页处有撕扯痕迹，内容涉及近期粮草调拨，数字有涂改。 | 半截蜡烛：在“青松驿外茶棚”中必须可见；必须有磨损金属符牌或腰牌，靠近证物区；线索原始细节：蜡烛上齿痕与陈四牙模不符，疑为他人所留，且蜡烛为京城样式。 | 陈四的鞋印：在“青松驿外茶棚”中必须可见；必须画成一个具体可见的物件或痕迹，材质、位置、遮挡关系清楚，不能只用标签或抽象概念；线索原始细节：鞋印方向是从驿站向外，表明陈四曾深夜外出，可能去会面。 | 粮草支用簿》残页：在“青松驿外茶棚”中必须可见；必须画成一个具体可见的物件或痕迹，材质、位置、遮挡关系清楚，不能只用标签或抽象概念；线索原始细节：缺页处有撕扯痕迹，内容涉及近期粮草调拨，数字有涂改。. Top-priority evidence slot contract: place these props as physical objects at the matching normalized image positions and keep them recognizable: 粮草支用簿》残页: slot_07, x=35%, y=42%, center-left table evidence zone; 半截蜡烛: slot_13, x=50%, y=50%, central mid-ground evidence zone; 陈四的鞋印: slot_19, x=65%, y=58%, lower center-right safe evidence zone; 粮草支用簿》残页: slot_09, x=65%, y=42%, center-right table evidence zone. Each evidence object must physically appear in the environment as a concrete prop, not as an abstract idea, not a label, not a timeline, not a diagram. Create several visible evidence zones in the middle third of the scene, using the natural location surfaces: table, counter, hidden compartment, floor, stone step, dock ground, body area, shelf, tray, or wall niche. Do not place evidence on sky, roof, high wall, signboard, plaque, or decorative text area. Keep important evidence away from image edges and away from UI-safe bottom space; leave enough empty air around each evidence object for hotspot markers. NPCs, buildings, furniture, and evidence share one coherent historical light source and dynasty costume system. Strictly forbid mountains, lakes, cabins, deer, western scenery, laboratory glassware, conical flasks, Erlenmeyer flasks, beakers, test tubes, modern glass bottles, plastic, electric lights, printed modern labels, modern furniture, and Western modern clothing. If the location contains a gate, shop, office, room entrance, inn entrance, archive, or hall, keep all lintels and panels blank; no signboard, no plaque, no banner, no readable characters above doors. Style must follow this script's own visual_style_guide: refined Chinese historical suspense illustration, painterly but readable, game-stage composition, coherent color script and camera, no ugly photorealistic plastic render, no bland stock courtyard, no random modern concept-art style. Use a grounded investigation camera and readable silhouettes.
